title: Fixture: Bronze-tier medium-criticality UC for tests
description: Counts blocked connection attempts with a multi-pipe one-liner that violates pipe-per-line formatting rules.
value: Medium-criticality bronze samples prove description/value distinctness checks still run when implementation depth is intentionally shallow.
spl: index=fixture_network sourcetype=fixture:fw action=blocked | stats count AS blocks BY src_ip | search blocks > 50 | sort - blocks

grandmaExplanation: We use this pretend firewall example in tests to check that simple monitoring write-ups still make sense to non-technical readers.
